scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,storefront -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w storefront"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w storefront
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,storefront -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w server" "npm run start -w storefront"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (process.env.VERCEL !== '1') { const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const { join } = require('path'); const bin = join(__dirname, 'node_modules', '.bin', process.platform === 'win32' ? 'patch-package.cmd' : 'patch-package'); try { execSync(bin, { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (err) { console.warn('patch-package is unavailable; skipping patch application.'); } }"
